mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, unread_count, join_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{unreadCount}, #{joinTime})

INSERT INTO chat_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, unread_count, join_time) VALUES
(#{member.conversationId}, #{member.userId}, #{member.unreadCount}, #{member.joinTime})
mapper.select: SELECT m1.conversation_id FROM chat_conversation_member m1 INNER JOIN chat_conversation_member m2 ON m1.conversation_id = m2.conversation_id INNER JOIN chat_conversation c ON c.id = m1.conversation_id WHERE m1.user_id = #{userIdA} AND m2.user_id = #{userIdB} AND c.type = 'private' LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.user_id AS userId, m.unread_count AS unreadCount, m.join_time AS joinTime, u.nickname, u.username FROM chat_conversation_member m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId}
